name: Hip Hop Squares
overview: Celebrity contestants face off and play "tic-tac-toe for dough", all for a lucky fan.  The celebs don't necessarily know all the answers, but they can be convincing enough to fool the contestants and have a really great time in the process.

trailers.title: Hip Hop Squares | Season 1 Official Super Trailer | Premieres Monday March 13th 9/8C | VH1
